overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Batman walking across a rain-soaked elevated platform in a dark, atmospheric city at night. The scene features cinematic noir lighting from streetlamps reflecting off wet concrete surfaces, with the caped character moving steadily toward a distant intersection with traffic signals.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked elevated concrete platform adjacent to highway ramp

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily across the wet elevated platform with cape flowing behind him, moving toward the distant city lights

entered.detail: Tall modern glass building with illuminated windows rising against the night sky
Large concrete highway ramp or overpass structure running parallel to the path
Tall streetlight with warm yellow glow illuminating the rainy scene
Rain-slicked concrete surface with visible puddles and cracks
Distant city buildings with scattered lights visible through the rain and fog
Metal chain-link fence running along the right edge of the platform

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, rain-soaked elevated concrete platform in a noir city environment. Batman walks steadily forward with his cape flowing, flanked by a concrete highway ramp on the left and a chain-link fence on the right. Streetlights cast warm glows through the heavy rain, while distant skyscrapers loom in the hazy background.

events.description: camera passes close to a tall ornate streetlight pole on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the ornate streetlight pole, maintaining steady pace across the wet surface

entered.detail: Tall decorative streetlight with glowing lamp and banner attachment, casting light through the rain

segments.scene_description: Batman continues walking across the platform, passing a prominent ornate streetlight pole on the right. The highway ramp remains visible on the left while the initial streetlight and fence recede behind. The rain intensifies the reflective glow on the wet concrete as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with traffic signals and circular building

events.description: approaching intersection with traffic light gantry and large circular industrial building becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection with traffic signals and circular building structure visible ahead

entered.detail: Horizontal traffic light structure with red signals suspended over the intersection ahead
Large cylindrical industrial building with curved roof and small windows, situated at the intersection

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, Batman approaches an intersection marked by a traffic light gantry with red signals and a distinctive large circular industrial building. The ornate streetlight falls behind as the camera moves forward, revealing more of the urban infrastructure ahead. The rain continues to fall heavily, creating a moody atmosphere with reflections on the wet concrete surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked elevated platform that leads from a desolate industrial stretch toward a glowing urban intersection. It begins with Batman walking steadily forward between a concrete highway ramp and a chain-link fence, with distant skyscrapers looming through a heavy, noir-inspired haze. As he advances, the camera passes an ornate streetlight pole on the right, causing the initial fence to recede while the rain intensifies the golden reflections on the wet concrete. The scene then opens up as the character approaches a traffic light gantry with red signals, shifting the focus toward a large circular industrial building ahead. Finally, the camera continues its forward momentum, leaving the streetlights behind to fully reveal the moody urban infrastructure under the persistent downpour.
